main_problems: No online booking — clients call during cuts when barbers can't answer
Walk-in waits frustrate clients and they leave — no way to hold their spot or give wait estimates
No client retention system — regulars go months between visits with no reminder
No way to fill last-minute open slots when a client cancels
Zero review automation — the shop does great work but rarely asks for Google reviews

recommended_automations.name: Missed Call Text-Back
recommended_automations.description: When a call is missed, an automated SMS fires within 30 seconds: 'Hey! This is King's Cuts — sorry we missed you. Want to book an appointment? Reply here or use [chatbot link] to grab a spot anytime.'
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Recovers 20–30% of missed calls — each recovered client = $25–$38 per visit

recommended_automations.name: Appointment Confirmation + Reminder
recommended_automations.description: SMS confirmation immediately on booking, reminder 2 hours before the appointment: 'Reminder: your cut at King's Cuts is today at [TIME]. See you soon!'

recommended_automations.name: Last-Minute Slot Fill Broadcast
recommended_automations.description: When a same-day cancellation happens, an SMS goes to a list of opted-in regulars: 'A spot just opened up at King's Cuts today at [TIME] — want it? Reply YES and it's yours.' First reply gets the slot.
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Fills 50–70% of cancelled slots that would otherwise be lost revenue

recommended_automations.name: Client Rebooking Nudge
recommended_automations.description: If a client hasn't booked in 4 weeks, send an SMS: 'Hey [name], it's been a while! Your fade is probably due — want to grab a spot this week at King's Cuts?' Simple, casual, on-brand.
recommended_automations.trigger: Last visit date + 28 days, no new booking found
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Recovers 2–4 lapsed regulars per month — each = $25–$300/year in recurring revenue

recommended_automations.name: Post-Cut Review Request
recommended_automations.description: 2 hours after an appointment end time, send an SMS: 'Hope the cut is fresh! If you're happy with it, a quick Google review would mean a lot — [LINK]. See you next time.'
recommended_automations.estimated_value: 4–8 new Google reviews per month — social proof drives walk-in traffic

implementation_timeline: 3–5 business days to build and test
